introSection: Berg & Tal is a travelling steel roller coaster operated by Fredy Schneider Schausteller GmbH in Germany.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The roller coaster was manufactured by Italian firm Pinfari in 1968.

fullText:
Berg & Tal is a travelling steel roller coaster operated by Fredy Schneider Schausteller GmbH in Germany.

The roller coaster was manufactured by Italian firm Pinfari in 1968.
